assertions.description: The review prompt referenced 4 gerber output files (NucleoTNC-gerbers, NucleoTNC_r3-gerbers, NucleoTNC_r4-gerbers, NucleoTNC_r5-gerbers), but the NucleoTNC repo contains no gerber files. The checked-out repo only has .sch and .kicad_pcb files. These outputs do not exist and cannot be reviewed.
